name: scaffold-prompt-workflow-compliance-v1
description: Deterministic artifact checks for adding team-memory scaffold areas, repo-local skills, managed schema guidance, prompt docs, and tests without naming drift.

success.description: Adds starter areas for conventions, reusable problems, and feature-specific memory.
Uses the established repo-local skill names.
Adds scaffold, prompt, or doctor tests for the new surfaces.

partial.description: Implements the broad idea but drifts from the established names or areas.
